nodes.label: IconResolver
nodes.rationale: Maps icon name strings to actual Material ImageVector instances. Used for persisting category icons as strings in SharedPreferences.

nodes.label: LauncherColors
nodes.rationale: Color palette for dark and light themes. Dark: deep blacks with teal/orange accents. Light: warm off-whites with deeper teal/orange accents.

nodes.label: ResolvedColors
nodes.rationale: Resolved colors based on current theme (dark/light). Use this instead of accessing LauncherColors directly in components.

nodes.label: LauncherTypography
nodes.rationale: Typography scale for the launcher. Uses system default sans-serif (Roboto on most devices) and monospace for technical/numeric elements.

nodes.label: Modifier.tourTarget
nodes.rationale: Extension function that attaches a special Modifier to existing UI elements for dynamic Product Tour positioning without injecting heavy code into base UI.

nodes.label: TourTargetElement
nodes.rationale: ModifierNodeElement that creates and updates TourTargetNode, bridging the declarative Modifier API with the imperative Node API.

nodes.label: TourTargetNode
nodes.rationale: Implements GlobalPositionAwareModifierNode to extract screen coordinates only when tour is active for that step, caching measures efficiently. Replaced Modifier.composed usage to reduce calculation cost during scroll.

nodes.label: PackageChangeReceiver
nodes.rationale: Self-managing BroadcastReceiver for package install/uninstall events; caller must register/unregister to control lifecycle.

nodes.label: AiPromptBuilder
nodes.rationale: Encodes grouping strategy constraints into LLM prompts to enforce 5-7 categories, semantic merging of tiny groups, and valid icon selection.

nodes.label: ConnectAiProviderTypeUseCase
nodes.rationale: Tests connectivity to AI providers (GROQ, Gemini, OpenRouter) and parses model lists with provider-specific JSON schemas and free-model filtering for OpenRouter.

nodes.label: LoadAppsUseCaseTest
nodes.rationale: Verifies two-phase app loading: metadata merge first, then icon resolution, with conditional work profile querying

nodes.label: FakeAppRepository
nodes.rationale: Hand-written fake that tracks icon pack requests to verify the use case passes selected packs to the repository

nodes.label: FakeWorkProfileManager
nodes.rationale: Hand-written fake that counts work profile app queries to verify conditional loading behavior

nodes.label: OrganizeAppsWithAiUseCaseTest
nodes.rationale: Verifies AI organization excludes system, games, and multimedia apps to reduce classification noise and API costs

nodes.label: CoroutineTestExtension
nodes.rationale: JUnit5 extension that replaces Dispatchers.Main with a TestDispatcher for predictable coroutine testing

nodes.label: LauncherSettingsPanelTest
nodes.rationale: Verifies responsive grid layout adapts column count based on screen width, icon size, and background visibility

nodes.label: Grid Launcher Visual Metaphor
nodes.rationale: The icon uses a 3x3 grid pattern on a teal rounded-square background to visually represent the app drawer/grid functionality of the launcher, following conventional launcher iconography.

nodes.label: Launcher app icon: teal rounded square with white 3x3 grid
nodes.norm_label: launcher app icon: teal rounded square with white 3x3 grid

nodes.label: MVI State Isolation for Scroll Performance
nodes.norm_label: mvi state isolation for scroll performance
